SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.compressor

Class CompressorAntiSurgeApplication

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.compressor.CompressorAntiSurgeApplication
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class CompressorAntiSurgeApplication extends Object implements Serializable
Commercial-style compressor anti-surge application design and simulation layer.

This class assembles the lower-level anti-surge utilities into a deterministic application model: multi-compressor stage supervision, shared-header diagnostics, hot/cold recycle valve command splitting, startup/shutdown sequence states, commissioning checks, scan-cycle execution, and operator-facing alarms and recommendations.

The implementation is for engineering studies, dynamic simulation, operator-training examples, commissioning support, and digital-twin advisory calculations. It is not a certified safety instrumented function, machinery protection system, safety PLC application, or compressor vendor controller.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

      public CompressorAntiSurgeApplication(String name)
      Create an anti-surge application.
      Parameters:

  • Method Details

    • addStage

      public CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageApplication addStage(String stageName)
      Add a compressor stage to the anti-surge application.
      Parameters:
      stageName - stage name
      Returns:
      created stage configuration

    • addStage

      public CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.StageApplication addStage(String stageName, Compressor compressor)
      Add a compressor stage backed by a NeqSim compressor object.
      Parameters:
      stageName - stage name
      compressor - compressor object; may be null for data-driven studies
      Returns:
      created stage configuration

    • addHeader

      public CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.HeaderApplication addHeader(String headerName, String... stageNames)
      Add a shared process header and connect stages to it by name.
      Parameters:
      headerName - header name
      stageNames - stage names connected to the header
      Returns:
      header configuration

    • scan

      public CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.ScanResult scan(CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.ScanInput scanInput, double dt)
      Execute one deterministic anti-surge scan cycle.
      Parameters:
      scanInput - scan input values keyed by stage name
      dt - scan period in seconds
      Returns:
      scan result with stage commands, header diagnostics, alarms, and recommendations

    • runDynamicStep

      public CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.ScanResult runDynamicStep(CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.ScanInput scanInput, double dt)
      Execute one scan, apply commands to bound topology objects, and run all bound process systems one transient step.
      Parameters:
      scanInput - optional scan input values keyed by stage name; null uses bound compressor measurements or design defaults
      dt - scan and dynamic timestep in seconds
      Returns:
      scan result before the process transient step is advanced

    • runCommissioningChecks

      public CompressorAntiSurgeApplication.CommissioningReport runCommissioningChecks()
      Run the commissioning support checks for the configured application.
      Returns:
      commissioning report

      stage - stage configuration
      input - scan input for the stage
      dt - scan period in seconds

      Parameters:
      header - header configuration
      stageDecisions - stage decisions from this scan
      Returns:
      header decision

      decisions - decisions to search
      Returns:
      matching decision, or null if none exists
